title: Create & Sorcery
description: A tech and exploration modpack with Create at its core. Adventure, build, farm, or decorate - fun with friends is the goal! Includes performance mods for lowerspec pc!
body:
![Create&Sorcery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3595bd6f9112288962621c3b6b7026d521e4714_0.webp)

A modpack focused on technology and exploration, but that’s not all! Everyone will find something for themselves here. If you enjoy a peaceful life, building, and running your own farm with animals, you’ll find that too.

The modpack features Create as the core technology mod, but that’s not its main focus, the goal is simply to have fun with friends. You’ll find everything you need here!

Want to set off on an adventure to find the perfect biome for you and your friends? Nothing is stopping you! Feel like exploring mysterious underground dungeons? Craft vanilla-friendly gear and venture into the unknown! 

Do you want to indulge in your passion for building? There’s a place for you here too! The modpack includes plenty of features for additional decorations, including placing fences and even diagonal glass!




(The modpack is still being refined. There are plans to create a fully custom FTB, but that’s something for the future. The pack is 100% playable in its current form)

Dont forget and before start the modpack, go to instance settings -> Java nad memory, check Custom memory allocation, and set it to 4000![Here!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04cdf99a207130c36b8a9e768398f781c623e964.png)
